title: orobus albus var. multijugus
intro: Orobus albus var. multijugus, also known as the many-flowered white vetchling, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is commonly found in Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Orobus albus var. multijugus include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which are attributed to its saponins and alkaloids. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to treat urinary tract infections, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism. Orobus albus var. multijugus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support kidney and urinary system health.
